entry.title: EKPO-TXZ01 not editable in ME32k for some users
entry.content:
Hello, all

Some users are reporting that they cannot change the short text in items in ME32K.

What can be the problem?

The same users in quality system can edit this field, with the same roles. 
I've tried to debug to find the problem, (watch-point when screen-name = 'EKPO-TXZ01' ) but couldnt find the problem.

The visualization of this field depends on the customing, in the code is reading some masks for the fields to determine if the field is editable or not. I couldnt find any place whith a different logic for this field. 

Thanks in advance.
Regards.

Thankyou.

entry.title: Re: Evaluate promotions without modifying session cart

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One Sales - Services App - How to config...
entry.content:
Hi gonzalogomez

For sales app (Hana), please check SAP note 2267084

https://help.sap.com/doc/92d52387a0e443afac614edb25af970f/1.1/en-US/How_to_Work_with_SAP_Business_One_Sales_for_iOS.pdf

For sales app (SQL), please check SAP note 3110082

For sales app (SQL), please check SAP note 2046101 

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: How to extract XSD from a WSDL with multiple Schema definitions
entry.content: Is this available to use?

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – Use Poll-Enrich with SFTP Adapter
entry.content:
I have seen that if I use a poll enrich in a looping process call, and there are suppose 4 files available on the SFTP server. The first file processes successfully but due to some reason the second file fails in some step ( as expected) and exception sub process is triggered. Once the message flow goes to exception sub process, the poll enrich step does not pick up any new file and the first 2 files are also not archived. The archiving part I am able to handle by adding some extra steps in exception handling (using a Send with SFTP and archiving the files separately instead of using Poll-Sender SFTP post processing method) but still the new files are not picked up as the iflow ends as soon as it goes into exception sub-process.

My requirement is to process all the files available on the SFTP server. In case a file goes into error, keep processing the next file.

Is there any solution to this?

 

Thanks in advance!

Ankita

entry.title: May I know the usage status of the relevant Fiori app
entry.content:
Hello, All

I'm working on Fiori for the first time.
 
I need to find out the usage status of Fiori app, please help me.
 
1. For example, if I said I was checking Fiori ID (F1311), where should I check it?
2. T-code: If Service is active in SICF, is it correct to use the app?
3. To use that APP, is there a way to see which Role is granted?
4. Is there any other way

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Security Guidance
entry.content:
Hi Roy,

 

welcome to the community :).
That is quite an interesting topic. I have written down my thoughts for example here: https://sapinsider.org/making-sap-s-4hana-secure-from-the-start/

It basically boils down to: From a basis perspective, it is not that big of a change from an ECC system. The main change is the user access via the browser, so we have to be aware of how to do HTTP access in a secure way as well as how authorizations work in a UI5 based environment.
In addition, the HANA database and its management tools might be new to some admins as well.

But apart from that, the main changes happen on an application level. The underlying architecture is still an AS ABAP.

In addition to the Security Baseline Concept (or basically any AS ABAP security recommendation) I would also recommend to look into the S/4HANA Security Guidance in the help pages (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE?locale=en-US => Security Guide) as a starting point.

I hope this helps as a first indicator for a direction to take.

 

Best regards,
Tobias

entry.title: Re: How to migrate business data from legacy to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private
entry.content:
Hi @Sybille 

Could you please share the link to the recorded webinar so I can watch it? Thanks and regards.

entry.title: Using FMCYCOPI_CO to copy planning in ACDOCP to Budget in FM only 2 dimensions are transferred
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are are implementing BCS to control budget at three levels: Commitment item (derived from account), Fund Center (derived from cost center) and Program (derived from PEP element). We can upload the budget through TCODE FMBB using these three dimensions accordingly.

We have implemented OSS note 3100868 - Data transfer ACDOCP to BCS with its dependencies in order that transaction FMCYCOPI_CO can have planning category instead of planning version.

We have used Fiori app Import financial plan data which creates in ACDOCP entries in which Cost center, Account and PEP element are populated. 

When executing the FMCYCOPI_CO TCODE to copy these CO planning entries to budget in BCS and activating trace on derivation rule I can seee that If I fill the three fields in selection screen (Cost center, account and PEP element) then Cost center appears empty on the trace screen (thererfore fund center can not be derived). If I fill cost center and account then PEP Element does not appear on the trace screen and therefore Program can not be derived. It seems that only two dimensions can be transferred from CO to BCS. Is this right or am I missing something?

entry.title: #CoE#JHNM 分类账问题
entry.content:
我们激活了5W2这个scope item，目前分类账是0L+4G，但是分配会计准则的时候，因为需要显示多个折旧范围的话需要将会计准则分配给公司代码层面，但是4G要求必须在分类账层面分配会计准则，否则资产会计就会报错。这样0L下的折旧范围就只有1，显示不了15了，这个有没有办法解决呢？如果没有办法可以取消激活5W2这个scope item吗？

截图：会计准则分配给分类账的情况下，折旧范围只有1

 

截图：如果将会计准分配给公司代码，4G在资产会计中就会报错

entry.title: Re: Bounce Details Amazon SES
entry.content:
Hi @martin_parent ,

We are not eligible to create tickets at Amazon.

However, I did also read that post where other users indicate that they are getting Transient = soft bounce replies from Amazon in case of "invalid domain". This is really annoying because "invalid domain" is clearly a hard bounce.

I am looking for a way to correct this in SAP Marketing Cloud, as it will not be possible from Amazon side as the other users already complained about that over a year ago.

Is there Custom Logic available that we can use for this?

And if there is Custom Logic available, in which field would I be able to see Amazon's returned bounceSubType and diagnosticCode?

As mentioned, I did already check in SMC the fields "interaction reason" and "content data / Bus. Doc. Stat. Des." . These fields sometimes contain that info on the bounceSubType and diagnosticCode, but not always. And mainly in these annoying cases with invalid domains, these fields remain empty on SAP Marketing Cloud... I don't understand why this field sometimes gets data and sometimes it does not...

 

Kind regards

Joyca

entry.title: Re: Announcing SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 5th October 2024
entry.content: @Mayur6969—Sure. We will get back to you soon. Would you like to communicate via an official email address?

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Companion Extended Scenario in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Thanks @ShaneLipke.

But the users are able to view the standard content without Enable Now login credetials. I can't enable the SSO since our organization has bought limited licenses currently. So, activating the SSO, will automatically create users in SAP Enable Now and consume the licenses. I don't want that to happen currently. However, we are planning to buy more licenses when the application will go-live. 

I have configured the parameters as per your suggestion like below:

LEARNING_APP_BACKEND_URL set to https://yourcompanyname.enable-now.cloud.sap/
LEARNING_APP_WORKSPACE set to sapextended

Since this learning app backend URL is changed from the standard values as below:

LEARNING_APP_BACKEND_URL ---- https://education.hana.ondemand.com/education/ 
LEARNING_APP_WORKSPACE ------ s4

If I set the standard values to parameters, the users can view the standard content but not the additional content in my custom workarea.  So, i am trying to find out a way to achieve the same scenario as explained earlier. Is there a way we can have learning content flow from 2 workareas like from 1. Standard SAP S4 workarea and 2.Custom Workarea from my Manager?  

Also, is there a way I can control the SAP Enable Now login prompt while the users logging into SAP Fiori? This is creating problem in absence of SSO.

Appreciate your help!

entry.title: Re: /801 split in case of change in pay during a month
entry.content: for documentation it worked with WPALL?FRST denoting different rules for each split

entry.title: Re: Export Simulation Video
entry.content: I have "Video Export" under Scripts and currently use Cloud Version 10.8.5 (build 4014)

entry.title: Re: Using LPD_CUST to create launch page for FPM obsolete?
entry.content: Hi, I am navigating from EAM web dynpro app to UI5 app with Intent based from LPD_CUST. I would like to know how can I add $filter here? Thank you.

entry.title: Missing Nodes In GS1 message mapping - PO to IS Migration
entry.content:
Hello fellow SAP developers

The IS migration tool was used to import a message mapping from SAP PO. The iflow was created from this migration and that is where the problem is happening. The mapping is from an ORDERS05 IDoc to a GS1 standard business document.

The message mapping produces an error where the target structure has missing nodes. The wsdl standard business document was imported first and there were references to other XSD schemas. I imported the other required XSD's, and I set the schema location path as shown below.

 

 

I'm running into an issue where I am importing local references in the iflow which are found in the references tab. There are many different imports which relate to one another in different XSD's. I'm referencing the imported files in the different XSD'd, is it right that the path is set as xsd/[filename]? 

Below it can be seen where the problem is coming from and how the mapping is failing to be completed and find the correct data. I have tried everything I can think of and have gone through multiple blog posts and forums but cannot find a viable solution. Thanks for the help!

 

Regards

Ian

entry.title: Re: Storage of small parts in an (automatic) high-bay rack
entry.content:
Hello @Roy08 

Have a look at the note 392776 - Capacity check in the Warehouse Management

You have not provided enough details on your setup e.g. if you use batch management, storage unit management, what your capacity check settings are...

If all standard options fail, you can build your own placement strategy with SMOD enhancement MWMTO003.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

With a professional background in IT], I have accumulated 10 years of experience working with non-SAP technologies. My journey has equipped me with a solid foundation, and I am always eager to expand my expertise.

I believe I am a great fit for this program because of my passion for continuous learning and my commitment to leveraging digital skills to drive innovation. The SAP Digital Skills Initiative aligns perfectly with my career goals, and I am confident that the program will provide me with the advanced skills and knowledge needed to excel in the ever-evolving digital landscape.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to contribute and grow within this esteemed program.

Best regards,

MinLee

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I hope this message finds you well.

My name is Ibrahim , and I am an aspiring SAP FI-CO Consultant based in Egypt. I have recently begun my journey in the SAP ecosystem and am eager to further develop my skills and knowledge in this field. I believe that participating in the Digital Skills Initiative will significantly aid in my professional growth.

I identify as a person in the following categories:

A resident of a remote or underserved location, where access to economic opportunities is limited compared to urban areas.
A first-generation college graduate, striving to build a successful career in technology.
A minority in my geographic location, with aspirations to make a significant impact in the SAP community.
The world of technology, particularly SAP, fascinates me with its potential to transform businesses and enhance their processes. I am committed to learning more about SAP FI-CO and to embracing the challenges of the certification process.

I have started my learning journey and am motivated to achieve certification, which I believe will open new doors in my career. I am grateful for the opportunity to apply for this initiative and am excited about the potential to contribute more effectively in the SAP space.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,
Ibrahim Youssef

entry.title: Re: Filter only numeric data - DTP
entry.content:
hi,

  I had this issue to me recently.

 I think it might because you didn't change the source DSO setting,like this.

  Change the field selection peoperties to -> selection possible, and refresh ,that we can find the filter in the DTP.

entry.title: Re: How Automated Processing Rules for Bank Statement works?
entry.content:
@Vijid  - Hi Vijid,

As to your first question: 
No, I'm afraid the "automated fallback processing rules" were only delivered for SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public edition) 2408 - that means, the Cloud release of last August. 

The feature has not been delivered for on-premise editions. 

If you'd like to request this feature for on-premise, I'd like to ask you to use the official channel, please: SAP Continuous Influence. 

I hope this helps.

Best regards,

Anita

entry.title: Re: shopping cart in MM for SAP Help
entry.content:
Hello,

please read: Shopping cart | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: How to change Physical inventory document template: data field "createdby" from CBID to user name?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I created a PI Document  and when I want to print the PI Doc, the PDF refers to "Created By" with the CB user number not the actual users name.

The output is taking the creation name from the CDS View : I_PHYSINVTRYDOCHEADER

Physical Inventory Document          10000000            PHYSICALINVENTORYDOCUMENT
Fiscal Year                                    2024                       FISCALYEAR
Inventory Transaction Type             IB                         INVENTORYTRANSACTIONTYPE
Document Date                             01/01/2024            DOCUMENTDATE
Planned Count Date                       01/01/2024          PHYSINVENTORYPLANNEDCOUNTDATE
Physical Inventory Created by User CBxxxxxxx       CREATEDBYUSERNAME

but the customer required that document should print the user name rather than CBID. I tried to edit the template using Adobe LiveCycle, but it didn't work. Can someone guide me on the overall process if I want to make modifications? 

Thanks a lot!

#SAP Cloud

entry.title: Best Practice for Dividing Databases by User on Save in SAP Cloud
Re: Force lock object / semaphores
entry.content: To handle this concurrency issue, you can implement a locking mechanism to ensure that only one user can access and modify the product-related object at a time. In SAP Business ByDesign, you might use "Lock Objects" or "Semaphores" to achieve this. Ensure that you acquire the lock before performing the checks and release it once the update is complete. This approach should help you prevent simultaneous updates from conflicting.

entry.title: Re: Adding Equipment's to object list in newly created maintenance item from backend
entry.content: Could you please let me know if we have any solution found for this. I am facing same issue, able to create OBKNR using "OBJECTLIST_NUMBER" but Object List Item is not getting with "IWOU_POST_OBJK" with same OBKNR.

entry.title: Re: Best Practice for Dividing Databases by User on Save...
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm working on an application in SAP Cloud and would like to implement a strategy where user-specific data is saved to separate databases (or schema partitions) to ensure data isolation and better performance for each user.
Any insights, best practices, or example configurations would be extremely helpful!

Thanks in advance for your support.

Kind regards 
Saidi

entry.title: ADT installation error in eclipse
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

Requesting your help/guidance in installation of ADT tools on eclipse as I am getting below errors while installing ADT tool in eclipse

Eclipse version - Version: 2024-03 (4.31.0)  

JDK version - 

openjdk version "21.0.2" 2024-01-16 LTS
OpenJDK Runtime Environment Temurin-21.0.2+13 (build 21.0.2+13-LTS)
OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM Temurin-21.0.2+13 (build 21.0.2+13-LTS, mixed mode, sharing)

ADT installation error - 

Cannot complete the install because one or more required items could not be found.

Software being installed: ABAP Development Tools for SAP HANA (Developer Edition) 3.44.0 (com.sap.adt.tools.hana.devedition.feature.group 3.44.0)

Missing requirement: ABAP Communication Framework 3.44.0 (com.sap.adt.fwk.ci.feature.group 3.44.0) requires 'org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; org.eclipse.emf.databinding.edit.feature.group [1.3.0,2.0.0), greedy=false' but it could not be found

Cannot satisfy dependency:

From: ABAP Development Tools Foundation - Basic Functionality 3.44.1 (com.sap.adt.tools.base.feature.group 3.44.1)

To: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; com.sap.adt.fwk.ci.feature.group 1.0.0, filter=(!(org.eclipse.equinox.p2.exclude.import=true))

Cannot satisfy dependency:

From: ABAP Development Tools Foundation 3.44.1 (com.sap.adt.tools.feature.group 3.44.1)

To: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; com.sap.adt.tools.base.feature.group 3.0.0.qualifier, filter=(!(org.eclipse.equinox.p2.exclude.import=true))

Cannot satisfy dependency:

From: ABAP Development Tools for SAP HANA (Developer Edition) 3.44.0 (com.sap.adt.tools.hana.devedition.feature.group 3.44.0)

To: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; com.sap.adt.tools.hana.feature.group [3.44.0,3.44.0]

Cannot satisfy dependency:

From: ABAP Development Tools for SAP HANA 3.44.0 (com.sap.adt.tools.hana.feature.group 3.44.0)

To: org.eclipse.equinox.p2.iu; com.sap.adt.tools.feature.group 1.5.0, filter=(!(org.eclipse.equinox.p2.exclude.import=true))

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content: Please send the whole flow logic of screen 400 of program ZPROG1 and the whole PAI module where you call transaction ZTRANS.

entry.title: Re: iOS Build Failing
entry.content:
Just an update. 

Making a change to the bundle identifier fixed this issue. Not creating a new one, but just updating the bundle identifier and then creating a new provisional profile fixed the issue. Not sure how this would fixed the issue, but it did.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content: Look at the Attributes of screen 400 of program ZPROG1. Maybe the "Next Screen" is set to 0 (empty in change mode).

entry.title: Retrieving "Specifications" Text from T-CODE QE03
entry.content:
Dear all,

Is it possible to retrieve the text displayed in the "Specifications" field in T-CODE QE03? If yes, what tables or function modules can be used to fetch this information?

I need to extract specification texts similar to what is shown in QE03 and display them on an ALV. For example, if the inspection characteristic is "Package Humidity," the specification would be "<= 4.5%." Another example would be the characteristic "Feel of package" with a specification like "Feel of package [that package unit]."

Currently, I am unable to find the complete specification text directly and seem to be manually processing and assigning the correct symbols to the text. Is there a more automated way to handle this?

entry.title: Re: Missing SAP Datasphere in Trial Account
entry.content: Oh I didn't notice. Thank you!

entry.content:

We already knew that there is no way to config additional special g/l indicators in SAP S/4hana cloud, public edition. But we just wanted to know if there will be costs or fees if we directly request to SAP  additional spcl g/l indicators necessary for the client's business? 

Thank You

Regards, 

Melle 

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Re: Missing Nodes In GS1 message mapping - PO to IS Migration
entry.content:
In the Figaf migration tool we do take the import place the imported XSD as inline.

I think you can do something manually.

entry.title: Mass maintenance of products in Demand driven replenishment
entry.content:
On what basis we need to select the materials in mass maintenance of products in Demand driven replenishment?

I got list of materials in the app based on classification. Out of this which and all materials I need to change the master data. How to give the reorder point, maximum stock, Minimum stock and MRP type to D1.

The DLT indicators are getting changed only after the change.

I hope this report shows the materials from table PPH_DD_PRODUCT and this is getting updated after running schedule product classification.

after changing the data in Mass maintenance of product in DD the table got updated.

But please let me know on what basis I need to change the data.

If I maintain the MRP type other than D1, D2 the DLT indicator or value XYZ are not getting updated.

After running schedule lead time classification of products DD the below fields are getting updated

On what basis the value from EFG getting updated.

entry.title: Text in a pop up showing edit cursor on hovering in SAC. How to change it to a click cursor?
entry.content: I have created a landing page where text box on the home page is showing a hand cursor on hover, but when I'm hovering on the text box of a pop up, it shows the edit cursor(like a big capital I sign). How can I change it to a hand or a normal cursor?

entry.title: Re: Upload Prices in Sales from template-based spreadsheet
entry.content:
Hi  Siwen,

we have done conversion from ECC to S4H and we would like to use app "Manage prices" for importing prices but we have a problem that Z fields from ECC are not shown when we export templates. We use SAP S/4HANA 2023 relese 108 / 0001. We checked your blog how to extend with new fields but this activity require to create new filelds and tables which is not OK for our case.

Is there any other tool than "Custom Fields and Logic App" or there are another way to include old Z fields to be available in that app.

Thanks and BR, Marko

entry.title: Part 2: The challenge immediately in front of us
entry.content:
From the Assembly Line to the Agile Age: Navigating the 3rd to 4th Generation Shift 

First, let’s start with some definitions and some history of how we got to where we are.   

The Industrial Revolution, marked by the rise of the assembly line, fundamentally transformed the way we work and live. This paradigm shift, originating in the late 1700s and gaining worldwide prominence with Henry Ford's mass production of the Model T in 1913, defined the 3rd generation of organizational structures. 

The 3rd Generation: A World of Specialization and Efficiency 

Characterized by a rigid hierarchy, division of labor, and a focus on efficiency, the 3rd generation organization was optimized for large-scale production. The assembly line, with its repetitive tasks and specialized roles, allowed for rapid and cost-effective manufacturing. However, as the global economy evolved, the limitations of this model became increasingly apparent.   

The rigidity of 3rd generation hierarchies, characterized by their strict chain of command and centralized decision-making, often hinders organizations' ability to adapt quickly to changing environments. These hierarchies can create bureaucratic red tape, making it difficult to implement new initiatives or respond to emerging challenges. Additionally, the concentration of power at the top can stifle creativity and innovation, as lower-level employees may feel constrained by the need to adhere to rigid procedures and seek approval for even minor decisions. This lack of autonomy and flexibility can limit an organization's speed to change and agility, ultimately hindering its ability to remain competitive in today's rapidly evolving business landscape. 

If Bob Evans and Thomas Hammes are to be believed and if AI will drive this innovation cycle (see Part 1), it’s not the technology that will impede us, it’s our organizational structure.   

The 4th Generation: Embracing Flexibility and Innovation 

In contrast to the 3rd generation, the 4th generation organization is defined by its adaptability, collaboration, and customer-centric approach. It emphasizes innovation, knowledge sharing, and empowerment of employees. To thrive in today's rapidly changing business landscape, organizations must transition from a rigid, top-down structure to a more agile and flexible one. 

Not only will the organizational structure need to change, but we need a well-trained and enthusiastic group of experts, let’s call them Business Transformation Champions, who will help usher in this change. 

The Challenges of Transition 

The shift from a 3rd to a 4th generation organization is not without its challenges. One of the most significant hurdles is overcoming the entrenched mindset of managers and leaders who may be resistant to change. The assembly line mentality, with its emphasis on control and efficiency, can be difficult to abandon. 

Furthermore, the transition to a 4th generation organization often involves reducing headcount to flatten the hierarchy and improve decision-making. This can be a politically charged issue, as it may lead to job losses and resistance from employees who fear for their job security. 

Overcoming Obstacles 

To successfully navigate the transition from a 3rd to a 4th generation organization, it is essential to: 

  • Foster a culture of innovation: Encourage experimentation, risk-taking, and continuous learning. 
  • Empower employees: Give employees the autonomy and resources they need to make decisions and solve problems. 
  • Promote collaboration: Break down silos and encourage cross-functional teamwork. 
  • Focus on customer needs: Put the customer at the center of everything you do. 

By embracing these principles, organizations can position themselves for long-term success in the 4th generation of organizational structures. In the next post, I will discuss how this shift is different from other types of change you might have experienced, and we'll start to explore the nature and structure of change itself.

How have technological changes influenced the way you work and collaborate? How has your organization adjusted to these shifting “ways of work?  What can this community do to help overcome these obstacles?

entry.title: Re: Public cloud - embedded EWM - automatic synchronous g...
entry.content:
Hello FRilke,

Thank you very much for confirming this. Then I can add it to the customer influence portal to hopefully be added somewhere in the future.

Kind regards,

Jens Koyen

entry.title: How to navigate directly to the commercial tab of the BP transaction
entry.content:
Hello experts!

I am using the following code to access the BP transaction using a customer number that has been clicked by the user.

 

  METHOD hotspot_click.

    CASE e_column_id-fieldname.
      WHEN 'KUNNR'.

        DATA: lt_return TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapiret2,
              ls_role   TYPE bus_roles.

        DATA(ls_output)  = gt_output[ e_row_id-index ].
        DATA(lo_request) = NEW cl_bupa_navigation_request( ).

        lo_request->set_partner_number( ls_output-kunnr ).
        lo_request->set_bupa_activity( '03' ). " 01 Create, 02 Change, 03 Display

        ls_role-role = 'ZC001'. " Clients/Debtors
        lo_request->set_bupa_partner_role( ls_role ).
        lo_request->set_bupa_sub_header_id( 'ZC001' ).

        " Display general data by default
        lo_request->set_maintenance_id( 'B' ).

        " Set start-up options
        DATA(lo_options) = NEW cl_bupa_dialog_joel_options( ).

        " Start the transaction with an invisible locator
        lo_options->set_locator_visible( space ).

        " Open New BDT Instance for display of selected partner
        CALL METHOD cl_bupa_dialog_joel=>start_with_navigation
          EXPORTING
            iv_request              = lo_request
            iv_options              = lo_options
            iv_in_new_internal_mode = abap_true
          EXCEPTIONS
            already_started         = 1
            not_allowed             = 2
            OTHERS                  = 3.

      WHEN OTHERS.
    ENDCASE.

  ENDMETHOD.

 

The code works perfectly and allows me to display the general customer data in the BP transaction.

However, I want to modify this code to navigate directly to the customer's business data.

I have seen that by modifying the maintenance_id parameter it navigates to the customer information within the BP transaction, but I have not found any value for this parameter that allows me to display the ‘Commercial’ tab.

Does anyone know where I can see the available values for maintenance_id or if there is an alternative?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Exciting Developments in the Auckland SAP Community: A Recap of the 2nd SAP Inside Track Event
entry.content: Seems like everyone had a great time! Congrats to the organizing team 🙂

entry.title: Re: Inconsistent Replication Flow Behavior in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
@MKreitlein, thank you for the response. Source system is S4HANA ONPREM, 2021 Release, SP 05 (11/2023).

We have implemented the SAP note. We will rerun the flows and provide feedback. Thank you once again!

entry.title: Re: Introducing Identity and Authentication Management in SAP Business One Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @matthias_kiendl 
Thanks for the feedback, I will reach out to our documentation team to capture this in our Identity and Authentication Management in SAP Business One Cloud guide, as it is indeed worthwhile mentioning. 

Best Regards
Guy

entry.title: Re: Einvoicing for India
entry.content:
Thank you for your question and you are right about the difference.

To summarize, there are two main approaches:

1. Legacy option: In this scenario, the customer is responsible for managing their own SAP Cloud Integration tenant. The electronic invoicing integration flows are deployed and maintained by the customer within their tenant. This gives the customer more control over the integration process but also requires more effort and resources from their side.

2. New option (SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, cloud edition): With this approach, customers can subscribe to a service provided by SAP where the integration between the business application and the electronic invoice tax authority system is managed entirely by SAP. This reduces the burden on the customer, as they don't need to maintain their own integration flows or Cloud Integration tenant.

I hope this clarifies the differences between the two options. If you have any further questions, please feel free to ask.

entry.title: When uploading attachments through Fiori, the backend system prompts for virus scanner profile.
entry.content:
Hi,

Facing issues when uploading attachments through Fiori, the backend system prompts for virus scanner profile.

Please suggest.

entry.title: Re: Task Center not attributing tasks correctly
entry.content: For information, you may embed the images inside your question (Ctrl+C/Ctrl+V of images), instead of posting the links. The people may be not willing to click every link to see the images (shown not even one below the other).

entry.title: Re: Hands-on Tutorial: Machine Learning with SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello,

for me a very big limitation is:

To schedule the prediction phase you mention Cloud foundry

=> you need a BTP account and a server setup to be used only for this scheduling? (costs to add a scheduling functionality?? it smell like drawbacks surpass advantages...)

Since Datasphere can run scheduled stored procedures.

and you can create stored procedures that uses PAL / APL procedures in database explorer.

Can a stored procedure / Table Function be used in combination with Python HANA_ML ?
Can I save the prediction "algorithm" be used into a stored procedure to be scheduled in datasphere task chains (or better in a table function)?

Best Regards,

Alberto

entry.title: Execute BEx queries at the same time
entry.content:
Dear Guru's,

May be you help me with the very strange situation. I'm not a specialist in SAP BW.

Situation:

In some of the workstations in the same window in different tabs of Google Chrome executing two different BEx query and on the second tab BEx query is waiting while query on the first tab is not finished and only after that is executing! In one of the workstations this situation is not repeat - the second query on the second tab executed regardless of the execution of the first query. What is the possible causes of this situation?

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to install more than one DP Agent on a machine (W...
entry.content:
Hi Mike,

You can for sure install more than one dp agent in the same machine, during the installation, you will have the option to input installation directory, listener port, admin port, just make sure you are not using the same for your existing dp agent, thanks.

Best regards
Helen

entry.title: Re: Why FM HR_ECM_DELETE_INFOTYPE does not work?
entry.content: You must at least call the function module HR_ECM_FLUSH_INFOTYPE.

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2405 Now Available – What’s New?
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a release date for the 2410 version of the SSAM already? I wanted to start implementing the SSAM in our S4 system in the next few weeks, but I would wait till 2410 comes out if it is sometime in October or November.

SAP Service and Asset Manager Mobile Application Integration Framework SAP Mobile Asset Management

i have a third party sales order. for that every time automatically purchase order is created by BATCH.

so user wants to block the sales order, because materials is already returned.

please tell me how to block the sales order.

Sanjeevani

entry.title: Re: Can we replicate data from ABAP CDS View having input...
entry.content:
Hi Ajinkya,

Currently input parameter with CDS view is not supported. You can create enhancement request to SAP. Our Product owner will check and see if we can include it in future release. Thanks.

Best regards
Helen

entry.title: Re: The SAP Reference Architecture for Artificial Intelligence Technology (unofficial)

hi buddy,

entry.title: Re: What happens with SDI virtual tables and remote sourc...
entry.content:
Hi Sascha,

DP agent is used to connect to MSSQL, in this case, if DP agent is down, then no access to the table content, there is no cache. 

The only impact is the datasource that use SDI connection, so during the downtime, if you have batch loading, it will fail(so if you have planned downtime or upgrade, do not run any batch loading),  if you have realtime replication(subscription), you can suspend the remote source before planned downtime.
https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_SMART_DATA_INTEGRATION/7952ef28a6914997abc01745fef1b607/782844c3cc8e4fcc89c78ffe83e03eb7.html

use sql command to do remote source suspend capture and suspend distribute, after restart of DP agent, resume capture and distribute. Thanks.

Best regards
Helen

entry.title: Re: In-app purchases
entry.content: Is there any way to incorperate in-app purchases @EsmeeX @MaiaraEllwanger  ?

entry.title: Re: Getting error while inserting in Internal Order table...
entry.content:
Hi Ashish,

If the test through BAPI call can finish successfully, then possible the case is the parameter pass through virtual procedure is not exactly the same as used in BAPI call directly in ERP system.  You can double confirm this.

Best regards
Helen

entry.title: Customer/Vendor Integration Conversion Process Authorizations Ownership
entry.content:
Team,
Please let me know which SAP Functional Team [ SAP HCM etc...] or SAP Technical Team should be ROLE OWNER [ Role assignment approver or Role Content Approver] for Customer/Vendor Integration Conversion Process Authorizations. Also, please share location of relevant documentation - if available. 

Thanks

Raj

entry.title: Re: FMs or BAPIs shall be used to update the PIRs i.e. MD62
entry.content:
PLANBEDARF_UPDATE is an update task FM; using this FM in customer code is bad practice (these FMs mainly execute the final SQL Abap statements that update the database, but ignore most, if not all, checks and dependencies).

It is better to look for a BAPI similar to BAPI_REQUIREMENTS_CHANGE in the BUS3027 Planned Independent Requirement business object.

entry.title: Adding hyperlinks into a comment in Signavio Collaboration Hub and/or Process Manager?
entry.content:
Hello all,

is there are way to add a clickable hyperlink in a comment in Signavio Collaboration Hub and/or Process Manager?
I tried to add a link with a HTML code like this, but it does not work: 

<a href="https://de.wikipedia.org" target="_blank">https://de.wikipedia.org</a>

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM, tenant extension
entry.content:
Hello,

more news in my latest blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-cloud-alm-tenant-extension-now-available-on-the-sap-price-list/ba-p/13860640

Nicolas

entry.title: Re: CDS VIEW ENTITY - CURR / QUAN calculated field gives...
entry.content:
Hi Martin,

Thanks for sharing this, I tried this approach of using  CURR_TO_DECFLOAT_AMOUNT, but then I get annoying error :

 

Also, I tried another apporach by casting DMBTR as Dec(23,2), that finally worked:

However, now I have another problem. I want to do the same for another amount field WRBTR, and i want to use the same 'calculatedUnit' for this fields as well. but then it cries that the 'calculatedUnit' can be used only once (see below). This is illogical in my opinion as why would the system not allow to use a unit as reference for multiple fields?

That means, for each Amount field calculation, I need a separate calculatedUnit (having the same or different value).

(honestly I don't understand why we even need this calculatedUnit and can't use the CURR reference instead, as the calculated value (dmbtr_per_menge) is an amount and not a quantity)

Just to emphasis the challange here, my real use case it to convert atleast 15 cost fields from KEPH table (say KST001...KST015 ) to get per unit cost for materials in business report. So with this approach, I need to create 15 'calculatedUnit' fields in the CDS having the same value (say EUR / KG).

This is not CLEAN ABAP in my opinion, and I am still looking for a better and simpler way of achieving this.

Regards,

Bharat Bajaj

entry.title: Re: How to migrate business data from legacy to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private

entry.title: Re: Task Center not attributing tasks correctly
entry.content: Hi, please check step 4 in this tutorial, maybe it will help https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/learn-how-to-configure-sap-build-process-automation-tasks-for-sap-task/ba-p/13576849

entry.title: HANA Tenant Copy Procedure - An Alternative To HSR
entry.content:
Hello All,

This blog will explain you details on how to copy HANA database using tenant copy procedure.

It can be helpful in various scenario's like

  • Database Homogenous Migration.
  • Refreshing Database.
  • Creating New system from existing one.

It follow similar mechanism as that of HANA Database Replication.

Prerequisite's for doing HANA tenant copy.

  • Verify TLS/SSL Configuration of Internal Communication Channels (Optional)
  • Set Up Trust Relationship Between Target and Source Systems (Optional)
  • Open Communication From Target to Source System (Mandatory)
  • Create Credential for Authenticated Access to Source System (Mandatory)

Unlike HSR we don't need OS access for doing tenant copy. we need SYSTEM user credentials for both target and source HANA database.

In our scenario, we did our HEC to RISE migration using HANA tenant copy. So this blog will be more focused on usage of Tenant copy in Database Migration.

Setting up parameters in source system

we need to set below parameters in source system. It might be possible that these are already set on the database so please verify the same.

In our case we did not had SSL communication and trust setup between source and target hence we are disabling SSL.

 

ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('multidb', 'enforce_ssl_database_replication') = 'false' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication_communication', 'enable_ssl') = 'off' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('communication', 'ssl') = 'off' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('communication', 'listeninterface') = '.global' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_async_buffer_size') = '1073741824' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_timeout') = '30' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('persistence', 'log_mode') = 'normal' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('inifile_checker', 'enable') = 'true' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('inifile_checker', 'replicate') = 'false' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('indexserver.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_async_buffer_size') = '10737418240' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_async_wait_on_buffer_full') = 'false' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_max_retention_size') = '1048576' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'enable_log_retention') = 'on' WITH RECONFIGURE;

 

Parameters to be set on target database

we need to set below parameters on target database (execute commands in systemDB > sql editor)

 

ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('multidb', 'enforce_ssl_database_replication') = 'false' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication_communication', 'enable_ssl') = 'off' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('communication', 'ssl') = 'off' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('communication', 'listeninterface') = '.global' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_async_buffer_size') = '1073741824' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_timeout') = '30' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('persistence', 'log_mode') = 'normal' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('inifile_checker', 'enable') = 'true' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('inifile_checker', 'replicate') = 'false' WITH RECONFIGURE;

 

Note : If this parameter are not set already then after setting up parameter you need restart of HANA database. (Both source DB and target DB)

Additionally we can check if any additional HANA source is having using below command

SELECT * FROM M_PLUGIN_MANIFESTS;

we need to have same plugins on target database as well

Setting up tenant copy 

Below are the steps to be followed to start tenant copy 

  1. Login to target database on systemDB using SYSTEM user using HANA studio
  2. Open SQL editor and run below commands.
  3. Stop tenant database

 

ALTER SYSTEM STOP DATABASE <SID>;

 

Note : If DB SID which you are copying is having same SID name then we need to drop the existing tenant DB. If you want to copy to different SID then no need to drop the existing tenant DB in target

  • We had same SID name hence dropping the target tenant DB using below command

 

Drop database <SID>; ​

 

  • Create Credential for Authenticated Access to Source System

 

CREATE CREDENTIAL FOR COMPONENT 'DATABASE_REPLICATION' PURPOSE '<hostname of source db>:<Nameserver SQL port>' TYPE 'PASSWORD' USING 'user="SYSTEM";password="<password>"'

 

  • Starting copy

 

CREATE DATABASE <SID> AS REPLICA OF <Source DB SID>  AT '<Source DB hostname>:<30001>';

 

This will start your tenant copy from source to target

you can monitor the progress using below command

 

SELECT * FROM SYS_DATABASES.M_DATABASE_REPLICA_STATISTICS;

 

you might get error regarding authentication or replication status as unknown.

for that you can find the logs in target database " indexserver log file "

Performing takeover / Finalizing replication

Once entire database is copied you will see status as " Active "

Now we are ready for finalizing the database copy.

Use below command on target SystemDB to complete the copy.

Note : when you are doing database migration you need to rampdown the source system application first then perform the  FINALIZE REPLICA

 

Alter database PRD FINALIZE REPLICA;

 

Once you are done with this you can drop the source system credentials using below command

 

DROP CREDENTIAL FOR COMPONENT 'DATABASE_REPLICATION' PURPOSE 'Source DB hostname:30001' TYPE 'PASSWORD';

 

 you can revert the parameters that were set during tenant copy procedure.

By using this method we migrated the systems hosted on HANA database from one datacenter to other datacenter.

Below are some reference articles of SAP

Copy a Tenant Database to Another System 

SAP Note - 2472478

entry.title: Re: EKPO-TXZ01 not editable in ME32k for some users

entry.title: Re: Call web URL in ABAP class (eclipse ADT)

entry.title: Re: Add standard field to Fiori App F2358
entry.content:
Hello @Kristian2 

Purpose of the app 'Monitor Purchase Order Items' has been clearly mentioned in the below documentation.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/82f1e2574096f432e10000000a441470.html 

I think there must a business reason associated for bringing IncoTerm field in above app. Request you to create your own report using the mentioned CDS views and other as per your requirement.

Best Regards,
Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: RISE with SAP: Multi-layer Defense in Depth Architecture of SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition
entry.content:
Dear @Jana_Cyber 

Really helpful blog. Could you help us with this questions:

Is the network of the customer further segmented? Are development, quality and production systems separated with their own VLANs and do these have firewalls in between? Is there a firewall between the ABAP application servers and their (HANA) database servers?

entry.title: Re: How to navigate directly to the commercial tab of the...
entry.content: Did you already try method SET_LOCATOR_ACTIVE_TAB of CL_BUPA_DIALOG_JOEL_OPTIONS ?

entry.title: Onboarding 2.0 - Onboarding error messages are not triggering in Personal Data Collection step
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have a requirement to show validation messages on click on 'Submit' button in Personal Data Collection step to new hire in case there is no 'National ID' data / 'Emergency Contact' data entered in PDC step.

We have tried using the Validate HRIS Elements / Hire Rehire scenario business rule scenario(s) to generate error messages on the candidate page, but we have not achieved the desired outcome. 

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 

@smitajalit @Gopinath @Kalai @ThomasBilbaugh 

Thank you!
Nandini M

entry.title: Re: Request for Guidance on Assigning PO Master Form Temp...

entry.title: Re: Video Series - Part 10 - Testing CAP application through Postman
entry.content:
Hi Kinsbrunner,

I have below requirement from client, Could you please tell me that can we configure with the use of SDK? if yes then what steps i should follow in SDK?

  • In C4C they want separate WCV (work center view) page where sales emp. update all opportunities revenue details in each month's field. Whatever opportunities created by particular sales emp. they can see all the oppotunities in this new WCV page. He/she can update revenue details in each months field manual and download the report of all updated fields.
  • Revenue details need to be updated for each opportunity across for all 12 months.
  • Total 17+ Columns need to create for this development.
  • Currency wise report need to download withing the page.
  • Can they maintain or download old months/year report?
  • Timeline or Period option required for report download.

Can we configure above requirement with the use of SDK for C4C opportunity?

Thank you!!!

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

entry.title: Re: How to mass upload from a spreadsheet file into an SAP Fiori app in SAP BTP ABAP Environment Par
entry.content:
Hi @Sanjeevani ,

Looking into the images you posted, it seems there is nothing wrong. It will be helpful if you please share the error, you are receiving However, you may double-check the following points for your reference.

1. You should define the press action in the control configuration section of your manifest.json file as mentioned below.

2. You will get the application id at the very beginning of manifest.json file.

entry.title: Re: How to Connect CAPM With Integration Suite ?
entry.content: Have you checked my comment that there is no EDMX for a REST service?

entry.title: Service Orders/Quotations 'Notes' not available for Form Templates
entry.content:
Hello,

The customer needs to show the "Notes" of service order and service quotation in a form. We have created a custom field for that but they don't have a field with that information available.

Custom logic is created for the CRMS4_SERV_CUST_H_MODIFY and inside of that logic, we are reading CDS Views "serviceorderlongtext" and "srvcqtanlongtext" to get those texts.

However, we are having a problem: The texts are being saved on those CDS Views after the BAdI runs, so they can only get the previous saved entrance in those tables but not the final results.

Does anyone have the same problem?
How did you solve it?

Best regards,
Ines Martins

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud - Version 2 - Utilities add on - How to create a Premise
entry.content:
Hello all,

I want to create a premise via SAP Service cloud - Utilities Add on. When i go to Premise i don´t have the option to create a new premise.

Can i create a premise via Service cloud?

Thanks,

Rita

entry.title: Re: When uploading attachments through Fiori, the backend...
entry.content: Ask your SAP Basis Team to implement the Virus Scanner. Because when you allow content to be uploaded this content must be scanned for infections. Also you should scan the files before downloading as with updated virus definitions previously undetected infections can be found.

entry.title: SAP B1 Web client does not show print layout same as SAP Client
entry.content:
Dear SAP Export,

Now I am testing the Web Client (SAP 10.0 FP2111) and I found when I preview print report on Web Client. The layout list that shows on Web Client has less than SAP Client. I did not see the layout that I wanna preview in the layout list on Web Client. 

How do I make the layout list show on Web Client same as SAP Client?

Best regards,
Siripong

entry.title: standard list of scope items for the MM
entry.content:
Hello,

Could you please let me know where I can find a standard list of scope items for the MM module, including various types of procurement documents and material type management? I am new to the MM module and am unsure where to start my studies. I have already reviewed scope items J45, 1XF, BNX, BMD, and BMK. Are there any other essential basics that I might have missed?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Automating Report Downloads with SAP Build Process Automation from DRC
entry.content: Great blog post, thanks @niladri11! 👍🏻
